calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Linda Keller To Perpetuate Testimony Of Thomas Sylvester By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for petitioner Linda Keller.
Emily M. Cunningham of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing through CourtCall for specially appearing Respondent Marconi Plastering Company.
William O. Martin of HAIGHT BROWN & BONESTEEL LLP (714-426-4600 ext. 4616), appearing through CourtCall for specially appearing Respondent Baker Perkins.
Jane C. Pandell of PANDELL LAW FIRM, INC. (925-974-1700), appearing through CourtCall for specially appearing Respondent Cleveland Wrecking Company.

RULING:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Linda Keller to Perpetuate testimony of Thomas Sylvester by Videotaped deposition is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 2035.010. Petitioner filed proof of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. No opposition filed. Deposition will occur as soon as possible by Zoom technology. All parties to file notice of appearance within 48 hours of receipt of the order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
